name: 19-invalid-capability-extra-confidence
description: Capability object carries an extra `confidence` field. schema-rule deferred the confidence field from v0.1; the schema uses additionalProperties: false on capability objects, so any extra field (including confidence) rejects.
notes: This fixture enforces the deferral decision from schema-rule at schema-validation time. If a future schema version re-introduces confidence, it must be renamed to evidenceConfidence with strict semantics (confidence in evidence-to-capability mapping, not trust in the claim) and added to the allowed-property set explicitly. Policies must not read such a field for allow decisions in v0.1 even if an emitter adds it under an extension namespace.
